Meta.description: Salzburg without the stress – the best spots, curated by locals.
Meta.homeTitle: SalzGuide: Google knows Salzburg. We've been there.
Meta.homeDescription: Two locals, one map: our favourite spots in the Salzburg region, each with a tip. We've been to every single one. Plus Toni, the AI that knows only these spots.
Meta.exploreDescription: Salzburg without the stress – the best spots, curated by locals.
Meta.proDescription: All secret spots, every audio walk and Toni without limits. One-time payment, no subscription.

Tours.title: Audio tours
Tours.subtitle: Explore Salzburg by ear – stories from locals, stop by stop.
Tours.listEmpty: No audio tours available right now. Check back soon.
Tours.lockedBody: The first stops are free. Unlock the full audio tour with Pro.
Tours.noAudio: There's no audio recording for this stop yet.
Tours.buildLead: Tell us what you're into – we'll build you a walking loop that always returns to the start.
Tours.buildCardSub: Pick your interests → we put together an audio loop
Tours.buildNeedLoginBody: Build and save your own audio walks once you're signed in. You can listen to curated walks without an account.
Tours.freeTextPlaceholder: e.g. lesser-known corners, something with music …
Tours.genError: That didn't work – please try again.
Tours.genTooFew: Not enough narrated points in this area yet. Check back soon.

Water.title: Water temperatures
Water.subtitle: Current water temperatures of Salzburg's bathing lakes.
Water.spotsHere: {count, plural, one {# spot here} other {# spots here}}
Water.attribution: Sources: Land Salzburg – Hydrographic Service (CC BY 4.0) & AGES bathing waters. Unverified raw data, no warranty.

Events.title: Events
Events.subtitle: What's on in Salzburg?
Events.empty: No events listed right now. Check back soon.

Ai.title: Toni
Ai.subtitle: your AI local
Ai.greeting: Hey! I'm Toni, your Salzburg local. What are you in the mood for? 🏔️
Ai.disclaimer: Toni is an AI and can make mistakes. Double-check details before you head out.
Ai.error: Oops, that didn't work. Please try again.
launcherBubbles: Hey! I know the good spots 😎

pillMsg.coffee: Where's really good coffee in Salzburg's old town?
pillMsg.swim: A chilled lake to cool off in, not too crowded
pillMsg.sunset: A nice sunset spot, easy to reach
pillMsg.weekend: What's on in Salzburg this weekend?
pillMsg.rain: What can you do in Salzburg on a rainy day?

Ai.paywallGuestBody: Sign up for free to ask Toni more often.
Ai.paywallProBody: With SalzGuide Pro you can ask Toni without limits – and unlock all the secret spots.

Explore.proTeaser: This spot is part of SalzGuide Pro. Unlock all the hidden highlights.
Explore.empty: No spots for this season yet.

storyMaker.sectionSub: Your photo, your route on top. Ready to share.
storyMaker.title: Create a story
storyMaker.hint: Pick a photo, we put your route on top.
storyMaker.error: That did not work. Try a different photo.
storyMaker.tooBig: This photo is too big. Pick a smaller one.

videoMaker.hint: Pick a video from your phone. You choose the right moment next.
videoMaker.trimHint: Drag the frame to the part you want in the video.
videoMaker.trimUnavailable: Preview not available here. The first seconds of your clip will be used.
videoMaker.error: That did not work. Try a different clip.
videoMaker.tooBig: This video is too big for your phone. Pick a shorter clip.

Detail.proTeaser: This spot is part of SalzGuide Pro. Unlock all the hidden highlights.

Saved.title: Saved
Saved.loginNeeded: Sign in to see your saved spots & events.
Saved.empty: Nothing saved yet. Tap the bookmark on spots or events to collect them here.

Auth.relaunchNotice: ✨ The new SalzGuide is here. Your Pro from the old site keeps running: same email, no password needed.
Auth.joinTitle: Sign in or create an account
Auth.joinSubtitle: With your email – no password needed. Save your favourite spots and plan your trips.
Auth.newsletter: Send me occasional tips, new spots & updates by email (unsubscribe anytime).
Auth.captchaUnavailable: The security check isn't working right now. Please reload the page.
Auth.captchaUnavailableGoogle: The security check isn't working right now. Please use Google above or reload the page.
Auth.error: Something went wrong – please check your email and try again.
Auth.captchaError: Please confirm you're not a robot and try again.
Auth.sentBody: We sent you a login link. Tap it to sign in.
Auth.legalHint: By signing in you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

Pro.title: SalzGuide
Pro.subtitle: Unlock the secret spots and get the most out of the Salzburg region.
Pro.feat2: Full access to every audio walk (listen & read)
Pro.feat3: Ask Toni, your AI local, without limits
Pro.consentLabel: I request immediate activation and confirm that I thereby lose my <w>right of withdrawal</w> (§ 18 FAGG).
Pro.consentRequired: Please confirm immediate activation to continue.
Pro.error: That didn't work. Please try again.
Pro.successBody: Your access is being activated. This can take a brief moment – reload the page if needed.
Pro.canceledBody: No worries – you can go Pro anytime.

stripe.title: Your Pro is live. 🎉
stripe.body: Thank you. Every Pro spot is open for you from now on.

migration.title: Your Pro is here 🎉
migration.body: Welcome back! Your Pro from the old site has carried over, unlimited. Nothing else to do.

comp.title: We've unlocked Pro for you. 🎉
comp.body: On the house. Every Pro spot is open for you from now on.

Pro.heroSubtitle: Every hidden gem, all audio tours and Toni without limits. Made by locals – no tourist kitsch.
Pro.loginNudge: Just your email: we'll send you a login link, then you go straight to checkout.
Pro.trustLocal: Made by locals in Salzburg – real insider tips.

Account.title: Your data & privacy
Account.intro: Manage your consents and exercise your GDPR rights here: unsubscribe from the newsletter, export all your data, or delete your account.
Account.exportHint: Download all data stored for your account as a JSON file (GDPR access request).
Account.exportError: Export failed. Please try again later.
Account.deleteHint: Permanently deletes your account and all your data.
Account.deleteConfirm: Really delete your account and ALL your data permanently?
Account.deleteError: Deletion failed. Please try again later.
Account.newsletterHint: Occasional new spots & tips. Unsubscribe anytime.

Demo.title: Building blocks demo
Demo.subtitle: SpotCards, carousel and the draggable bottom sheet.
Demo.sheetBody: Drag me up by the handle (full) or down (close). This same sheet will later show spot details, filters and the AI assistant – on top of the map.

Support.title: We're here to help
Support.subtitle: Something not working, a spot that's wrong, or a question? Write to us. There are two of us and we read every message ourselves.
Support.name: Name
Support.messagePlaceholder: What's up? The more precise, the faster we can help.
Support.sentBody: We have your message and will reply by email. Usually within a day or two.
Support.captchaUnavailable: The security check isn't working right now. Please reload the page.
Support.privacyHint: We only use your details to reply to you.

error.email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.message: Please write us a few more words.
error.captcha: Please confirm you're not a robot and try again.
error.generic: That didn't work. Please try again.

Legal.tagline: Your digital guide to the Salzburg region.
Legal.deOnly: These legal texts are only available in German; the German version is legally binding.

default.title: You need an account for this
default.body: Sign in quickly, then pick up right here.

saveSpot.title: Save this spot
saveSpot.body: Goes straight to your list – so you find it again when you actually want to go.

saveEvent.title: Save this event
saveEvent.body: Goes straight to your list – so the date doesn't slip past you.

buildTour.title: Build your own route
buildTour.body: So your route is still there after you close the tab. Ready-made routes work without an account.
